stories.title: Why Most Cryptocurrencies Won’t Accrue Value
stories.summary: Lyn Alden argues that while she remains bullish on bitcoin, most other cryptocurrencies are unlikely to accrue durable long-term value.

stories.title: The Rise of Bitcoin Stocks and Bonds
stories.summary: An overview of how bitcoin treasury strategies and related capital-market instruments are reshaping the broader Bitcoin ecosystem.

stories.title: Gold price surges after weak US payrolls shake US Dollar
stories.summary: Gold climbed after a weaker-than-expected US jobs report boosted Fed easing bets and pressured the dollar while risk aversion increased.

stories.title: GBP/USD rises as US Supreme Court blocks Trump's tariffs
stories.summary: Sterling strengthened after a US Supreme Court decision on tariffs dented the dollar, even as traders weighed softer GDP and hotter core PCE data.

stories.title: Private Credit Just Turned Into Public Panic
stories.summary: A ZeroHedge contributor argues that redemption stress at large private credit funds could trigger broader investor panic and worsen liquidity mismatches.

stories.title: BlackRock Slashes Private Loan Value From 100 To 0
stories.summary: ZeroHedge reports that BlackRock marked a private loan to zero, highlighting growing strain and valuation risk in private credit markets.

stories.title: Illicit stablecoin activity hit 5-year high of $141B in 2025: TRM Labs
stories.summary: TRM Labs says illicit entities received roughly $141 billion via stablecoins in 2025, the highest level in five years for that channel.

stories.title: AI-enabled scams rose 500% in 2025 as crypto theft goes industrial
stories.summary: TRM Labs says large language models sharply amplified scam operations in 2025 as fraudsters industrialized crypto-enabled theft.

stories.title: Bitcoin Could Be Entering a New Macro Regime
stories.summary: A Coin Bureau analysis examines whether macro policy shifts and liquidity conditions are setting up a fresh Bitcoin regime change.

stories.title: Stablecoins, Rates and the Next Crypto Liquidity Cycle
stories.summary: Coin Bureau reviews how rates, stablecoin growth and global liquidity could influence the next phase of crypto-market expansion.
